statements.__comment__: DEPRECATED: temporary backward-compatibility migration. Earlier versions created (GSuiteUser)-[:RESOURCE]->(GSuiteTenant) (OUTWARD); the schema now expects (GSuiteTenant)-[:RESOURCE]->(GSuiteUser) (INWARD). Recreate inverted edges and drop the originals so cleanup picks up the new direction. Remove in v1.0.0.
statements.query: MATCH (u:GSuiteUser)-[r:RESOURCE]->(t:GSuiteTenant) MERGE (t)-[r2:RESOURCE]->(u) ON CREATE SET r2.lastupdated = r.lastupdated DELETE r

statements.__comment__: DEPRECATED: same migration for GSuiteGroup. Remove in v1.0.0.
statements.query: MATCH (g:GSuiteGroup)-[r:RESOURCE]->(t:GSuiteTenant) MERGE (t)-[r2:RESOURCE]->(g) ON CREATE SET r2.lastupdated = r.lastupdated DELETE r
